title: Gondolin Config
description: Configuration for the pi-gondolin sandbox extension. Used at ~/.pi/agent/gondolin.json (global) and <project>/.pi/gondolin.json (per-project).

allowedHosts.description: Hostnames the sandbox is allowed to reach over HTTPS. Supports wildcards (e.g. "*.github.com"). Global and per-project lists are concatenated.

secrets.description: Secrets injected into matching HTTP requests via placeholder replacement. Each key is a secret name (e.g. GH_TOKEN). The guest references it as $GH_TOKEN in headers. Global and per-project are merged; per-project wins on key conflict.

keychain.description: macOS Keychain account name under service "pi-gondolin".

hosts.description: Hosts that receive this secret value.

mounts.description: Additional host directories mounted into the VM. Each key is an absolute guest path. Global and per-project are merged; per-project wins on key conflict.

path.description: Host path. Supports ~ for home directory.
